recommendations.title: 3 Days Max
recommendations.overview: Clumsy policeman Rayane has three days to rescue his kidnapped grandmother from a Mexican cartel.

recommendations.title: 30 Days Max
recommendations.overview: Rayane is a scared and clumsy young cop who is constantly mocked by other cops. The day his doctor wrongly tells him that he has only thirty days to live, he understands that this is his last chance to become a hero within his police station and impr

recommendations.title: Heartbreaker
recommendations.overview: Alex and his sister run a business designed to break up relationships. They are hired by a rich man to break up the wedding of his daughter. The only problem is that they only have one week to do so.

recommendations.title: Poverty and Nobility
recommendations.overview: Eugene, a young nobleman, asks two penniless idlers to impersonate his noble relatives to help him marry Gemma, the daughter of an enriched cook.

recommendations.title: Big Trouble in Little China
recommendations.overview: Truck driver Jack Burton gets embroiled in a supernatural battle when his best friend Wang Chi's green-eyed fiancée is kidnapped by henchmen of the sorcerer Lo Pan, who must marry a girl with green eyes in order to return to the human realm.

recommendations.title: Hobson's Choice
recommendations.overview: A widower refuses to let his three daughters marry in order to avoid paying settlements, so they'll just have to outsmart him.

recommendations.title: How to Marry a Millionaire
recommendations.overview: Three women set out to find eligible millionaires to marry, but find true love in the process.

recommendations.title: The Best Man's Wedding
recommendations.overview: Roro, a foreign worker in Swedish parks, loves his girlfriend but is about to marry another girl to prevent her from being sent back to Lebanon. Meanwhile, Roro's best friend, Måns, has serious problems getting an erection.

recommendations.title: Sonu Ke Titu Ki Sweety
recommendations.overview: Titu is going to marry a perfect woman named Sweety. Titu's best-friend Sonu doubts Sweety's character and tries to break the marriage while Sweety tries to do opposite and which leads to war between Bromance and Romace.

recommendations.title: The Italian
